title: Solihull campaigners face further fight against fossil fuel giant Shell over petrol station plans

title: Mary Beard says the ancient world is a 'good place' for perspective

title: Ancient Basavanna idol discovered during lake desilting in Haveri village
description: Haveri: In a significant and culturally rich discovery, a centuries-old Basavanna idol was unearthed during desilting work in a village lake in Haveri district. The incident took place in Dudihalli...

title: Eight historical sites in South Cumbria - from Roman ruins to ancient castles
description: South Cumbria has a rich history, evidence of which can still be found today.
